title: NBSV Candidate Record v5.0
description: Schema for a product candidate in the NBSV pipeline. All data fields map directly to GitHub Issue labels and body sections.

id.description: GitHub Issue number prefixed with 'gh' — e.g. 'gh42'

name.description: Internal product reference name. Never shared with workshop.

sourceChannel.description: Which of the 5 NBSV source channels this candidate came from

discoveredBy.description: Whether discovered manually by founder or by a scout agent

channelSignal.description: The virality proof from the source channel (e.g. '1.2M views', '840 backers', '650 upvotes')

egyptianBehaviorAnswer.description: SPECIFIC Egyptian behavior this product replaces or enhances. Must name a behavioral moment, not a generic category.

q1_neverBeforeSeen.description: All 5 Egyptian platforms checked and clean

q3_workshopProducible.description: Green-list materials, zero electronics, ≤6 steps, COGS within target

productionPath.description: Standard (COGS ≤80 EGP) or Semi-DIY finish (COGS ≤120 EGP, founder adds finish layer)

cogsEstimate.description: Estimated COGS per unit in EGP at batch 30

seasonContext.description: Seasonal demand context. 'continuous' = year-round, no seasonal gate applies.

status.description: Current pipeline stage. Maps directly to GitHub Issue labels.

killSignal.description: If rejected: which kill signal ended the candidate (required when status = rejected)

githubIssueNumber.description: GitHub Issue number for this candidate

closedDate.description: Date candidate was closed (YYYY-MM-DD) — applies to closed-won and rejected
